role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within the linguistic domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues consistent with the landscape role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed biome types (Pampas, scrub) and vegetation density, staying within botanical scope.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings (double yellow lines) and infrastructure (utility poles), fitting the regulatory role.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Focused on camera artifacts and cross-domain infrastructure patterns, appropriate for the meta role.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Brazil. The meta agent provided the decisive evidence (camera artifacts and pole style), which the tournament judge correctly prioritized over the ambiguous landscape/regulatory signals shared by Argentina and Uruguay.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain and scrubland match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of temperate/subtropical vegetation match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of road markings and poles match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of camera blur and pole style match the image.
